full_text:
Taoqiu Hong (Zilin) 陶丘洪 (子林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Taoqiu Hong (陶丘洪), styledZilin (子林). Praised Liu Dai and Liu Yao. Almost joined a plot to kidnap Emperor Ling. Taoqiu Hong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
